en: "And to the angel of the church in Sardis write: 'The words of him who has the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. "'I know your works. You have the reputation of being alive, but you are dead.
zh: “你要寫信給在撒狄教會的使者，說： ‘那有 神七靈和七星的這樣說：我知道你的行為，你有名聲，說你是活著的，其實你是死的。

en: Wake up, and strengthen what remains and is about to die, for I have not found your works complete in the sight of my God.
zh: 你要警醒，把那些剩下來將要死的堅強起來；因為我見你的行為在我 神面前是不完全的。

en: Remember, then, what you received and heard. Keep it, and repent. If you will not wake up, I will come like a thief, and you will not know at what hour I will come against you.
zh: 所以，你應當回想你是怎樣領受、怎樣聽見的；應該遵守，也應該悔改。你若不警醒，我就要像賊來到一樣。我甚麼時候來到你那裡，你決不能知道。

en: Yet you have still a few names in Sardis, people who have not soiled their garments, and they will walk with me in white, for they are worthy.
zh: 然而在撒狄你還有幾名是未曾玷污自己衣服的，他們要身穿白衣與我同行；因為他們是配得上的。

en: The one who conquers will be clothed thus in white garments, and I will never blot his name out of the book of life. I will confess his name before my Father and before his angels.
zh: 得勝的，也必這樣身穿白衣，我決不從生命冊上塗抹他的名，我還要在我父和他的眾天使面前，承認他的名。

en: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.'
zh: 聖靈向眾教會所說的話，有耳的就應當聽。’

en: "And to the angel of the church in Philadelphia write: 'The words of the holy one, the true one, who has the key of David, who opens and no one will shut, who shuts and no one opens.
zh: “你要寫信給在非拉鐵非教會的使者，說： ‘那聖潔的、真實的， 拿著大衛的鑰匙， 開了就沒有人能關， 關了就沒有人能開的 ，這樣說：

en: "'I know your works. Behold, I have set before you an open door, which no one is able to shut. I know that you have but little power, and yet you have kept my word and have not denied my name.
zh: 我知道你的行為，看哪！我已經在你面前給你一道開著的門，是沒有人能關的；因為你有一點點力量，也遵守我的道，沒有否認我的名。

en: Behold, I will make those of the synagogue of Satan who say that they are Jews and are not, but lie- behold, I will make them come and bow down before your feet and they will learn that I have loved you.
zh: 看哪！從撒但的一黨，就是自稱是猶太人，其實不是猶太人，而是說謊的人中，我要使他們一些人來在你腳前下拜，並且知道我已經愛了你。

en: Because you have kept my word about patient endurance, I will keep you from the hour of trial that is coming on the whole world, to try those who dwell on the earth.
zh: 你既然遵守了我忍耐的道，我也必定保守你脫離那試煉的時候；這就是那將要臨到普天下，來試煉住在地上的人的時候。

en: I am coming soon. Hold fast what you have, so that no one may seize your crown.
zh: 我必快來！你要持守你所有的，不要讓人拿走你的冠冕。

en: The one who conquers, I will make him a pillar in the temple of my God. Never shall he go out of it, and I will write on him the name of my God, and the name of the city of my God, the new Jerusalem, which comes down from my God out of heaven, and my own new name.
zh: 得勝的，我要叫他在我 神的聖所裡作柱子，他決不再出去，我也要把我 神的名，和我 神的城的名，就是那從天上、從我 神那裡降下來的新耶路撒冷，以及我的新名，都寫在他身上。

en: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.'
zh: 聖靈向眾教會所說的話，有耳的就應當聽。’

en: "And to the angel of the church in Laodicea write: 'The words of the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the beginning of God's creation.
zh: “你要寫信給在老底嘉教會的使者，說： ‘那位阿們的，忠信真實的見證人， 神創造萬有的根源，這樣說：

en: "'I know your works: you are neither cold nor hot. Would that you were either cold or hot!
zh: 我知道你的行為，你不冷也不熱；我巴不得你或冷或熱。

en: So, because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, I will spit you out of my mouth.
zh: 因為你好像溫水，不熱也不冷，所以我要把你從我口中吐出去。

en: For you say, I am rich, I have prospered, and I need nothing, not realizing that you are wretched, pitiable, poor, blind, and naked.
zh: 你說：我是富足的，已經發了財，毫無缺乏。卻不知你是困苦的、可憐的、貧窮的、瞎眼的、赤身的。

en: I counsel you to buy from me gold refined by fire, so that you may be rich, and white garments so that you may clothe yourself and the shame of your nakedness may not be seen, and salve to anoint your eyes, so that you may see.
zh: 我勸你向我買精煉的金子，使你富足；又買白衣穿上，使你赤身的羞恥不會顯露出來；也買眼藥膏抹你的眼睛，使你可以看見。

en: Those whom I love, I reprove and discipline, so be zealous and repent.
zh: 凡是我所愛的，我就責備管教；所以你要熱心，也要悔改。

en: Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, I will come in to him and eat with him, and he with me.
zh: 看哪！我站在門外敲門；如果有人聽見我的聲音就開門的，我要進到他那裡去，我要跟他在一起，他也要跟我在一起吃飯。

en: The one who conquers, I will grant him to sit with me on my throne, as I also conquered and sat down with my Father on his throne.
zh: 得勝的，我必定賜他和我一同坐在我的寶座上，正像我得了勝和我父一同坐在他的寶座上一樣。

en: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.'"
zh: 聖靈向眾教會所說的話，有耳的就應當聽。’”
